title: Holiday activities and food programme: grant allocations
body: "The holiday activities and food programme (HAF) funds local authorities to co-ordinate free holiday provision for eligible children.  The local authority capacity support funding will support school age childcare.  From April 2026, the local government finance settlement will provide funding for HAF.  The ‘holiday activities and food and local authority capacity support: 2026 financial year expected allocations’ guidance sets out expected spend totals.  The 2021 financial year to 2025 financial year holiday activities and food programme grant determination letters:   set out payments for the financial year includes supporting guidance outlining how we intend local authorities to use the funding   The Secretary of State for Education makes grant determinations under section 31 of the Local Government Act 2003.  "
